title: Run K-fold cross-validated LC fits and finalize all folds in one call
summary: Combines `cv-fit` and `cv-finalize` into a single command: runs latent class fits across all folds, then immediately finalizes each fold and writes the aggregate CV summary. Emits a single started / finished event pair.
description: Walks a `choice-cv split` directory and runs an LC fit on every fold via the EM algorithm, then immediately finalizes each fold to produce per-fold exports. After all folds complete, writes `cv_summary.csv` and `cv_summary.json`. Equivalent to calling `cv-fit` then `cv-finalize` back-to-back, but in a single protocol invocation. The raw per-fold EM state is preserved so you can still call `cv-finalize` separately if needed.
usage:
[["model-mnl-lc::cv-fit-finalize"]]
folds_dir = "<cv-folds dir>"
run_dir = "<output dir>"
run_name = "lc_run"
# optional:
segments = 2
em_iterations = 200
random_seed = 0
threads = 1

arguments.name: folds_dir
arguments.description: Directory containing per-fold subdirectories. Each subdirectory must contain `train.csv` and `test.csv` files in coded long format.

arguments.name: run_dir
arguments.description: Output directory. Created if it does not exist. Each fold gets its own subdirectory, and `cv_summary.csv` plus `cv_summary.json` are written at the top level.

arguments.name: run_name
arguments.description: Short identifier for this run. Non-empty string. Used to name output artifacts and subdirectories so multiple runs under the same run_dir do not collide. Must not contain path separators or '..'.

arguments.name: export_dir
arguments.description: Where to write per-fold CSV exports. Defaults to `{run_dir}/{fold_id}/exports`.

arguments.name: headers
arguments.description: Whether the per-fold CSVs have a header row. Default `true`.

arguments.name: segments
arguments.description: Number of latent classes. Default `2`. Applied to every fold.

arguments.name: em_iterations
arguments.description: Maximum EM iterations per fold. Default `200`.

arguments.name: start_method
arguments.description: Initialisation strategy applied to every fold.

arguments.name: use_soft_start
arguments.description: Enable simulated-annealing soft start on segment assignments.

arguments.name: random_seed
arguments.description: Random seed (`0` = non-deterministic). Each fold derives its own seed from the base seed.

arguments.name: threads
arguments.description: Number of threads per fold. Default `1`.

details: `cv-fit-finalize` runs the complete LC cross-validation pipeline in a single call. Each fold is fit via EM and immediately finalized before moving to the next fold. The aggregate CV summary is written after all folds complete. The raw per-fold EM state is persisted so you can still call `cv-finalize` separately if needed.
value:
On success, `run_dir` contains:

- One subdirectory per fold, each containing the EM state and finalized exports (`IC.csv`, `coefficients.csv`).
- `cv_summary.csv` and `cv_summary.json` at the top level.

In protocol mode the plugin emits a single `event.run.started`, then `event.run.finished` (or `event.run.failed`) carrying the aggregate summary.
notes: Equivalent to calling `cv-fit` then `cv-finalize` with the same `run_dir`.
For model selection on `segments`, run several `cv-fit-finalize` calls against the same fold directory and compare the aggregate holdout LL.

see_also.description: Produces the per-fold directory layout this command consumes.

examples.title: Basic 5-fold LC CV fit-finalize at 2 classes

fields.name: folds_dir
fields.description: Directory containing per-fold subdirectories (each with train.csv + test.csv).

fields.name: run_dir
fields.description: Output directory. Per-fold subdirectories and cv_summary.csv are written here.

fields.name: run_name
fields.description: Short identifier for this run. Non-empty string. Used to name output artifacts and subdirectories so multiple runs under the same run_dir do not collide. Must not contain path separators or '..'.

fields.name: export_dir
fields.description: Where to write per-fold CSV exports. Defaults to {fold_dir}/exports.

fields.name: headers
fields.description: Whether CSVs have a header row. Default: true.

fields.name: em_iterations
fields.description: Maximum EM iterations per fold. Default: 200.

fields.name: threads
fields.description: Number of threads per fold. Default: 1.

artifacts.title: Cross-validation summary
artifacts.description: Per-fold and aggregate train/holdout log-likelihood. The headline metric for comparing LC solutions with different numbers of classes on held-out respondents.

artifacts.title: Per-fold exports
artifacts.description: Finalized exports for each fold: IC.csv and coefficients.csv per class.
